transcript.clean_text: on stage 14 of the tour de france it was the michael matthews show his best ever win attacking from a long way up 50 k's to go taking on the final climb and winning in the meantime jonas finger will continues to win the tour de france stage 14 saw him keep his two minutes 22 second lead with him and pogacad adding to the lead of those chasing the peloton turned up in jordaes for stage 15 a 202.5 kilometer run without primogeoglitch ruglich not starting due to injury with magnus court and simon clark both suffering from covid carcassonne the destination venue for many arrest day and a day that could be complicated by the wind with the odd climb here and there as well hot conditions the hottest perhaps for some time 40 degrees out on the road the beginning of the day saw fernat at it yet again surprisingly at the front of the race in the breakaway finding himself with michael honore and niels pollock the german champion bike exchange soon went to work but after 40 kilometers watfornaut was told to wait up two were left in the breakaway bike exchange and trek continuing to control pollet continuing his own adventure with honoree a breakaway or a sprint had been the forecast for the day forecast for the weather boiling hot another short protest interrupted the riders and then disaster for yambo visma serving kyle's fake on the ground and out of the tour de france yamavisma losing two of their key climbing domestiques in a day and then this the yellow jersey down as well jonas finger goal alongside tishbernot better news this time for the dutch team with both their leader and bernout back on their bikes but a nervous chase for the young dane back to the front a candor attack had gone up the road with 50 kilometers to go the final classified climb of the day first jonas that be followed by two further riders with some of the sprinters being dropped jakobson and ewen not seeing the front of the bunch rich taken back grunowega the next to be distanced and then those two attackers over the top benjamin thomas local rider from southwest france and alexey gujar both up the road trying their luck the gap would grow to over half a minute the furious chases behind to try and bring back sprinters we're also influencing things crunebega would return alexander christoph fighting hard just to hold on pollock who'd been in the breakaway now trying to pull things back a bundle of energy on the day as energy was also expended by the gc teams to keep everybody at the front given the threat of crosswinds gujjar be first to be caught tomar continuing and hoping to pull off something special kofis without winning a stage for 14 years of the tour de france got benjamin thomas into the final 500 meters but he'd be swallowed up by the advancing peloton sprinters left having their shorter lead out trains do the work trek segafredo would be the team trying to set up mass pitherson and after having ridden all day starving tried to lead out the dane fanart was there however phillipson continued seneschal would have a go for quick step sagam was there lunavegan called out and as fanart came around on the left it would be phillips on the right as we look at the shot peterson in the middle down in third phillips and the belgian taking the stage win by about half a wheel ahead of what for night a tour de france stage win for the young belgian sprinter and alpacinda koenig taking their first stage win of this tour de france philips fanart peterson segan from popple the top five four and a half hours in the heat with jonas vinegar keeping yellow keeping his gap but losing two key domestiques as they head to the next rest day he keeps two minutes 22 over pogacad 243 over garrett thomas with bowed a fourth yates fifth heading into the pyrenees while fernat remains in the green jersey all he has to do seemingly is to stay on his bike a huge lead over pogaccha with philipson's win now taking him into third the tour de france will resume on tuesday a stage from carcassonne to foie the pyrenees and our first contact with the next mountain range over the mighty murder before finishing in for two tough climbs towards the end and a stage 178 kilometers long and you can watch the tour de france om and fam the tour de france fam avec swift starting in a week it's all on demand and live of course on gcn plus you
